title: CLAT 2027 aspirants in the dark as Consortium sits on reform committee report for 4 months
description: The Expert Committee constituted by the Consortium of National Law Universities (NLUs) to recommend reforms to the Common Law Admission Test (CLAT) 2027 submitted its report to the Consortium's Advisory Board on February 2, 2026.4 months since, the Consortium has not made the report public or communicated any proposed changes to aspirants.CLAT 2027 is tentatively scheduled for December 2026.Prof Tarunabh Khaitan, Co-Chair of the Expert Committee and Professor of Public Law at the London School o
